title: Remove mood-based activity tabs from post-mood-selection view

requirements.text: In ConversationInput.tsx, remove the tabbed panel of mood-based resources that appears after the user submits their mood/feeling. This includes removing the tabs and their content for: Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, and Journaling. The input form for submitting emotional check-ins should remain intact.

quotes: remove the options, music, dance, stories, self care, meditation, what to watch and journaling that appear after user clicks on how are you feeling? and chooses their mood

acceptanceCriteria: After a user selects their mood/feeling, no tab panel with Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, or Journaling options is displayed.
The emotional check-in input form still functions correctly for submitting moods.
No broken imports or unused tab content components remain referenced in ConversationInput.tsx.

constraints: Do not remove or modify the bottom navigation tabs (ChatBottomTabs.tsx) — the Music, Journal, Meditation, Good Vibes, and Watch This tabs in the bottom bar should remain.
Do not alter the backend or any data-fetching logic unrelated to the removed UI.
The emotional check-in input and mood submission flow must remain fully functional.
nonGoals: Removing the Music, Journal, or Meditation full-screen pages.
Removing the bottom tab navigation bar.
Changing any backend logic or data models.
Modifying the ConversationHistory or ResponseDisplay components.
